dict.string: HealthApp reads your steps, heart rate, sleep, and weight to provide personalized AI nutrition feedback and contextual health summaries.
HealthApp writes nutrition data to Apple Health to keep your daily macro and calorie logs synced across all your apps.
HealthApp uses your camera to scan food and extract nutrition facts.
HealthApp needs full access to your calendar to schedule appointments and display your upcoming health events.
HealthApp needs write access to your calendar to add doctor appointments and follow-up visits.
HealthApp needs access to your reminders to save and sync medication, hydration, and habit schedules.
